_meta.note: Daemon-backed PTY start. MCP exposes argv plus optional cwd/env/rows/cols and optional per-job bucket_config_json / rules_json; success returns bounded identifiers and a bucket cursor, never a screen buffer or raw stream text.

unsupported_platform_error_example.message: daemon ipc error [UnsupportedPlatform]: PTY command runtime is not available on this platform yet (ConPTY support pending)

invariants: argv is required and must be non-empty
env is an ARRAY of {key,value} objects, not a map; empty/omitted inherits the daemon environment, a non-empty list REPLACES it entirely (include PATH yourself)
an env map (e.g. {"FOO":"bar"}) is rejected with a teaching error naming the {key,value} array shape
MCP request does not expose the daemon-only environment field, but does accept optional bucket_config_json and rules_json that map to daemon IPC without a prior registry_activate
success payload contains only job_id, bucket_id, probe_id, and cursor
pty_command_start is not a shell bridge and rejects shell interpreters
